source_name: Corbelli et al. 2014 — VLA+GBT HI surface-density map (author reduction)

expected_file_type: FITS cube and/or moment-0 surface-density map
suitable_for: G1 primary HI if provenance matches paper reduction
notes: Preferred Tier A HI product. No direct public FITS URL identified on A&A, arXiv, or VizieR. Author/archive request remains primary route.

source_name: Corbelli et al. 2014 — BVIgi stellar mass map (pixel-SED)
license_or_usage_note: Contact Corbelli / Thilker; cite A&A 572 A23
suitable_for: G2 primary stellar if provenance matches BVIgi reduction
notes: Preferred Tier A stellar product. Public IRAC-derived maps are Tier B proxies only.

source_name: Koch et al. 2018 MNRAS — M33 L-band HI (VLA C + GBT short spacing)
license_or_usage_note: MIT license on scripts; cite Koch et al. 2018 if using products

suitable_for: HI, velocity — public Tier B pilot if cubes rebuilt
notes: VLA project 14B-088 reduction in GitHub 14B-088/HI. Not the Corbelli 2014 merged product; different reduction team/epoch. CANFAR scripts may exist separately.

source_name: CANFAR — Koch M33 HI products (if archived)
license_or_usage_note: CANFAR/CADC terms; cite Koch et al. 2018
notes: Search CANFAR vault for Koch / 14B-088 M33 products. No single canonical DOI indexed in this audit; prefer LGLBS v1.0 for newer public HI release.

source_name: LGLBS HI Data Release v1.0 — M33

suitable_for: HI, velocity, uncertainty — fastest Tier B HI route

source_name: Lockman et al. 2012 GBT M33 HI (short spacing for Koch/LGLBS)
